tools.note: Validates the request before network access, keeps MONTHLY and UPFRONT schedules separate, skips only identical duplicate resource IDs and rejects conflicting duplicates, classifies dated prices against one UTC day, preserves every effective, scheduled, and undated price, and reports continuation and truncation without claiming partial data is complete. A complete plan uses its latest dated effective price as current, falling back deterministically to an undated starting price. Legacy current_price and scheduled_prices are populated only when the fetched records form one unambiguous plan summary.

tools.note: Deprecated by Apple 4.4.1. Backward-compatible only: this handler preserves the legacy product-scoped reserve, signed transfer, commit, reconciliation, and rollback behavior and emits a structured success warning; it never creates or selects a version. Use subscriptions_create_version plus subscriptions_upload_version_image. PREPARE_FOR_SUBMISSION, WAITING_FOR_REVIEW, APPROVED, and REJECTED mean legacy upload processing is complete; FAILED is terminal failure; AWAITING_UPLOAD, UPLOAD_COMPLETE, missing, and unknown states remain pending. Confirmed nonterminal commits remain accepted and retained with exact inspection guidance; only confirmed pre-commit reservations are eligible for best-effort rollback.

inputs.localRole: Use the reserved screenshot ID returned by Apple as the commit path ID.
Use the reserved screenshot ID returned by Apple as the commit resource ID.
Use the MD5 checksum produced while uploading the local file through Apple's presigned operations.

operations.condition: After PATCH returns a nonterminal delivery state, or when the PATCH response is ambiguous, reconcile and poll the reserved review screenshot by ID until processing reaches a terminal state or local verification stops.

optionalParameterClassifications.reason: The public tool returns its stable base projection instead of arbitrary relationship expansion; dedicated commerce tools cover related resources.

operations.condition: Before any commit PATCH is attempted, best-effort delete a confirmed reservation when cancellation, a missing upload plan, byte-transfer failure, or commit-body preparation prevents commit; treat 404 as already absent.

inputs.localRole: Rollback only the known reservation for this upload attempt.

fields.localRole: Creates an immutable temporary snapshot before reserve, then derives reserve metadata, supplies binary upload bytes, and drives the commit checksum from that same snapshot.

tools.note: The handler snapshots the file before reserve; binary transfer through Apple's signed operations is a local/external step. COMPLETE is successful; FAILED is terminal failure; any other assetDeliveryState remains pending and is polled with conditional GET. After a confirmed 2xx commit, nonterminal processing is an accepted success with uploadCommitted=true, processingComplete=false, deliveryPending=true, and retrySafe=false. If PATCH transport remains ambiguous and reconciliation only shows pending, the outcome stays an error; either way the review screenshot is retained with inspection guidance. A mismatched 2xx commit resource triggers one GET of the expected screenshot ID; valid terminal or pending state is interpreted normally, while invalid reconciliation stays an error. A confirmed reservation that fails before PATCH is best-effort deleted independently of cancellation; an unresolved create response instead requires parent-collection inspection because Apple exposes no idempotency key for locating that exact reservation.
